mapper.select: SELECT score.id AS id, stu.id AS studentId, stu.seat_no AS seatNo, stu.chinese_name AS chineseName, stu.english_name AS englishName, stu.display_name_type AS displayNameType, stu.student_no AS studentNo, score.score AS score, susr.username AS updateUser, score.create_time AS createTime FROM student_graduate_exam_score score LEFT JOIN student_info stu ON stu.id = score.student_id LEFT JOIN student_graduate_exam_task exam ON exam.id = score.task_id LEFT JOIN sys_user_school_rel susr ON susr.school_id = exam.school_id AND susr.user_id = score.update_id AND susr.deleted = 0 WHERE score.deleted = 0 AND score.task_id = #{taskId} ORDER BY stu.seat_no IS NULL, stu.seat_no ASC, stu.chinese_name ASC

SELECT DISTINCT score.task_id FROM student_graduate_exam_score score LEFT JOIN student_info stu ON stu.id = score.student_id WHERE score.deleted = 0 AND (stu.chinese_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{studentInfo}, '%') OR stu.english_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{studentInfo}, '%') OR stu.student_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{studentInfo}, '%'))

SELECT score.id AS id, stu.id AS studentId, stu.seat_no AS seatNo, stu.chinese_name AS chineseName, stu.english_name AS englishName, stu.display_name_type AS displayNameType, stu.student_no AS studentNo, task.subject_id AS subjectId, subject.subject_name AS subjectName, task.id AS taskId, task.name AS taskName, task.test_date AS testDate, stu.student_no AS studentNo, score.score AS score FROM student_graduate_exam_score score LEFT JOIN student_graduate_exam_task task ON task.id = score.task_id LEFT JOIN subject_rel srl ON srl.id = task.subject_id LEFT JOIN subject subject ON subject.id = srl.subject_id LEFT JOIN student_info stu ON stu.id = score.student_id WHERE score.deleted = 0 AND task.deleted = 0 AND score.student_id = #{studentId} AND score.task_id IN
#{item}
